column2:
Consent Form
Do you consent to participate in this survey? Your information will be kept confidential and used only for research purposes.
column7: How often you perform your religious activities?
column8: Where do you currently live? (Urban refers to cities or towns; Rural refers to villages or countryside)
column10: Do you have any source of income? (Do you earn money from any source?)
column12:
What is your Institutions? 
Please select Others if the institution is not in the list and specify manually.
column13: If you have selected Others, then specify your institution's name.
column14:
What is your current CGPA up to previous semester or year out of 4.00? Please write in numeric form, for example 3.45.
Medical Students write pass or fail  instead of CGPA in previous professional exam.
column15: What type of institution/university do you attend?
column16: What is your field of study?
column17: What year of study are you currently in?
column18: How would you describe your class participation?
column19: On a scale of 1 to 5, how satisfied are you with the services provided by your university? (1 being the worst, 5 being the best)
column20: Have you ever taken a semester gap or year gap during your studies?
column21: Have your academic program experienced session jam (সেশন জট)?
column22: Have you ever experienced ragging, been ragged, or tortured by seniors on campus?
column23: How often do you feel depressed about your career/future?
column24: What type of family do you live in? (Joint: extended family with relatives living together; Nuclear: only parents and children)
column25: How would you describe your family environment for studying?
column26: What is your father's highest level of education? (Primary: Class 0-5; Secondary: Class 6-12 or Diploma; Higher education: Bachelor's degree or above
column28: What is your mother's highest level of education? (Primary: Class 0-5; Secondary: Class 6-12 or Diploma; Higher education: Bachelor's degree or above)
column30: How often do you use psychoactive substances? (Substances that affect your mind or mental processes, such as drugs, alcohol, etc.)
column31: How often do you smoke cigarettes?
column32: How often do you experience anxiety? (Feeling nervous, worried, or uneasy about what might happen)
column33: How often do you experience insomnia (a common sleep disorder that can make it hard to fall asleep or stay asleep )?
column34: How often do you use electronic devices (laptop, desktop, smartphones, etc.)?
column35: Have you ever thought about taking your own life or Have you ever wanted to end your life?
